name: kale-deploy
description: Kale Deploy assistant adapter for building Kale-compatible Cloudflare apps.

interface.shortDescription: Build and deploy apps that fit the Kale runtime.
interface.longDescription: A Codex plugin that teaches the Kale Deploy runtime, bundles the remote Kale MCP server, and provides a kale-init command prompt for scaffolding and shipping new projects.
defaultPrompt: Use Kale Deploy to build me a small web app.
Scaffold and deploy a Kale-compatible survey tool.
Make this Worker fit Kale Deploy and push it live.
